# Strait Ruby SDK

> Official Ruby SDK for the Strait job orchestration platform. Provides Faraday HTTP client, authoring DSL, composition helpers, FSM state machines, and 186 API operations across 19 services. Requires Ruby 3.1+.

## Installation

- `gem install strait-ruby` or add `gem "strait-ruby"` to Gemfile

## Client Creation

- `Strait::Client.new(base_url: "...", api_key: "...")`: Create client with inline options
- `Strait::Client.from_env`: Create client from STRAIT_BASE_URL + STRAIT_API_KEY environment variables
- `Strait::Client.from_file`: Create client from strait.json configuration file

## Services (19)

- `client.jobs`: Jobs — list, create, get, update, delete, clone, get_health, trigger, bulk_trigger, list_versions, get_version, list_dependencies, create_dependency, delete_dependency, batch, batch_disable, batch_enable
- `client.runs`: Runs — list, get, delete, list_checkpoints, get_children, debug, get_debug_bundle, list_dependency_status, dlq_replay, list_events, delete_idempotency_key, get_lineage, list_outputs, replay, reschedule, list_tool_calls, get_usage, bulk_cancel, bulk_cancel_all, bulk_dlq_replay, bulk_replay, get_dlq
- `client.workflows`: Workflows — list, create, get, update, delete, clone, dry_run, plan, simulate, trigger, get_graph, get_graph_by_workflow_id, list_runs, list_versions, get_version, get_diff, get_policy, upsert_policy, get_explain, list_labels, get_impact, list_steps_by_version
- `client.workflow_runs`: WorkflowRuns — list, get, delete, pause, resume, retry, list_steps, approve_step, retry_step, skip_step, force_complete_step, replay_subtree_step, bulk_cancel, bulk_replay
- `client.deployments`: Deployments — list, create, finalize, promote, rollback
- `client.environments`: Environments — list, create, get, update, delete, list_variables
- `client.secrets`: Secrets — list, create, delete
- `client.api_keys`: APIKeys — list, create, delete, rotate
- `client.webhooks`: Webhooks — list_subscriptions, create_subscription, delete_subscription, list_deliveries, get_delivery, retry_delivery
- `client.event_triggers`: EventTriggers — list_events, get_event, delete_event, send_event, send_prefix, purge_event, get_stat
- `client.event_sources`: EventSources — list, create, get, update, delete, subscribe, list_subscriptions, delete_subscription, dispatch_event
- `client.batch_operations`: BatchOperations — list, get
- `client.stats`: Stats — list
- `client.analytics`: Analytics — get_performance
- `client.log_drains`: LogDrains — list, create, get, update, delete
- `client.sdk_runs`: SDKRuns — annotate_run, checkpoint_run, complete_run, continue_run, fail_run, heartbeat_run, log_run, output_run, progress_run, spawn_run, tool_call_run, usage_run, wait_for_event_run
- `client.rbac`: RBAC — list_audit_events, list_members, create_member, delete_member, bulk_member, list_roles, create_role, get_role, update_role, delete_role, list_resource_policies, create_resource_policy, delete_resource_policy, list_tag_policies, create_tag_policy, delete_tag_policy, seed_roles
- `client.job_groups`: JobGroups — list, create, get, update, delete, list_jobs, pause_all, resume_all, get_stats
- `client.health`: Health — list, get_ready, list_metrics

## Authoring DSL

- `Strait::Authoring.define_job(name:, slug:, endpoint_url:, ...)`: Define a job with lifecycle handlers (run, on_success, on_failure, on_start)
- `Strait::Authoring.define_workflow(name:, slug:, steps:, ...)`: Define a workflow with DAG steps
- `Strait::Authoring.job_step(ref, job_id, **options)`: Create a job step for workflow DAG
- `Strait::Authoring.approval_step(ref, **options)`: Create an approval gate step
- `Strait::Authoring.sub_workflow_step(ref, workflow_id, **options)`: Create a sub-workflow step
- `Strait::Authoring.wait_for_event_step(ref, event_key, **options)`: Create a wait-for-event step
- `Strait::Authoring.sleep_step(ref, duration_secs, **options)`: Create a sleep step
- `Strait::Authoring.validate_dag(steps)`: Validate DAG using Kahn's topological sort

## Composition Helpers

- `Strait::Composition.with_retry(attempts:, delay_ms:, factor:, max_delay_ms:, jitter:) { ... }`: Retry with exponential backoff
- `Strait::Composition.wait_for_run(run_id, get_run, timeout_ms:, initial_delay_ms:, max_delay_ms:, factor:)`: Poll until terminal
- `Strait::Composition.trigger_and_wait(input, trigger_fn, get_run, **options)`: Trigger + wait combined
- `Strait::Composition.paginate(list_fn, limit:)`: Cursor-based pagination enumerator
- `Strait::Composition.with_idempotency(headers, key)`: Add Idempotency-Key header
- `Strait::Composition.create_and_finalize_deployment(client, body)`: Create + finalize deployment
- `Strait::Composition.create_finalize_promote_deployment(client, body)`: Create + finalize + promote deployment

## FSM State Machines

- `Strait::FSM.can_transition_run?(from, event)`: Check if run transition is valid
- `Strait::FSM.transition_run(from, event)`: Execute run state transition
- `Strait::FSM.terminal_run_status?(status)`: Check if run status is terminal
- `Strait::FSM.can_transition_workflow_run?(from, event)`: Check workflow run transition
- `Strait::FSM.can_transition_step_run?(from, event)`: Check step run transition

## Error Types

- `Strait::TransportError`: Network failures
- `Strait::DecodeError`: JSON parse failures
- `Strait::ValidationError`: Config/input validation
- `Strait::UnauthorizedError`: 401/403
- `Strait::NotFoundError`: 404
- `Strait::ConflictError`: 409
- `Strait::RateLimitedError`: 429
- `Strait::ApiError`: Other HTTP errors
- `Strait::TimeoutError`: Polling timeout
- `Strait::DagValidationError`: DAG validation failures

## Middleware

- `Strait::Middleware.new(on_request:, on_response:, on_error:)`: Hook into request lifecycle
